author: Komputer Mechanic
title: OpenClaw Image Generation Setup
summary: Interactive installer for OpenClaw image generation. Supports OpenAI (gpt-image-1) and fal.ai (7 models including FLUX and Nano Banana). Handles fresh setup, model switching, and uninstall. Automatically creates the fal_image skill, updates openclaw.json, saves API keys to .env, and restarts the OpenClaw gateway.
